message:
Improve memory management and robustness in web rendering

App.tsx:
- Fix event listener cleanup: options must match exactly between
  addEventListener and removeEventListener for proper removal
- Store options as const variables to ensure identical objects

SequenceView.tsx:
- Increase long-press cancel distance threshold from 12px to 22px
- Accounts for natural finger jitter during touch interactions
- Prevents accidental cancellation of intentional long-press actions

useScrollRestoration.ts:
- Add MAX_CACHE_ENTRIES limit (50) to prevent unbounded memory growth
- Implement FIFO eviction when cache exceeds limit
- Map iteration order is insertion order, so oldest entries deleted first

GlyphAtlas.ts:
- Add dispose() method for explicit resource cleanup
- Clears canvas pixel data and resets dimensions to 1x1
- Releases glyph references to allow garbage collection
- Should be called on component unmount to prevent memory leaks

sequence-render.worker.ts:
- Wrap entire message handler in try/catch
- Post structured error messages back to main thread
- Prevents silent failures in web worker context

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
